ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the athlete */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach assigned to the athlete */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the athlete belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the athlete */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the athlete */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the athlete's profile picture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the athlete's profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the athlete's profile was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach is assigned to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the coach */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the coach's profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the coach's profile was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport the team participates in */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Date the team was founded */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the team's profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the team's profile was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workouts" (
  "workout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workout */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete assigned to the workout */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach who assigned the workout */,
  "workout_date" TEXT /* Date of the workout */,
  "workout_type" TEXT /* Type of workout (e.g., endurance, strength) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the workout */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the workout */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the workout in minutes */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the workout took place */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the workout */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the workout was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the workout was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workouts_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workouts_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gps_data" (
  "gps_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GPS data point */,
  "workout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workout the GPS data belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the GPS data point */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the GPS data point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the GPS data point */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance covered during the workout */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the athlete during the workout */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation at the GPS data point */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the GPS data point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the GPS data point was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gps_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gps_data_workout_id FOREIGN KEY ("workout_id") REFERENCES workouts ("workout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "heart_rate_data" (
  "heart_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each heart rate data point */,
  "workout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workout the heart rate data belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the heart rate data point */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Heart rate of the athlete during the workout */,
  "heart_rate_zone" TEXT /* Heart rate zone (e.g., Zone 1, Zone 2) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the heart rate data point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the heart rate data point was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("heart_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_heart_rate_data_workout_id FOREIGN KEY ("workout_id") REFERENCES workouts ("workout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stroke_rate_data" (
  "stroke_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stroke rate data point */,
  "workout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workout the stroke rate data belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the stroke rate data point */,
  "stroke_rate" REAL /* Stroke rate of the athlete during the workout */,
  "stroke_type" TEXT /* Type of stroke (e.g., freestyle, backstroke) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the stroke rate data point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the stroke rate data point was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stroke_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stroke_rate_data_workout_id FOREIGN KEY ("workout_id") REFERENCES workouts ("workout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "power_data" (
  "power_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each power output data point */,
  "workout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workout the power output data belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the power output data point */,
  "power_output" REAL /* Power output of the athlete during the workout */,
  "cadence" INTEGER /* Cadence (number of pedal strokes per minute) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the power output data point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the power output data point was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("power_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_power_data_workout_id FOREIGN KEY ("workout_id") REFERENCES workouts ("workout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "catch_data" (
  "catch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each catch data point */,
  "workout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workout the catch data belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the catch data point */,
  "catch_angle" REAL /* Catch angle of the athlete during the workout */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the catch */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the catch data point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the catch data point was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("catch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_catch_data_workout_id FOREIGN KEY ("workout_id") REFERENCES workouts ("workout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "slip_data" (
  "slip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each slip data point */,
  "workout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workout the slip data belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the slip data point */,
  "slip_value" REAL /* Slip value of the athlete during the workout */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the slip */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the slip data point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the slip data point was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("slip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_slip_data_workout_id FOREIGN KEY ("workout_id") REFERENCES workouts ("workout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "finish_data" (
  "finish_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each finish data point */,
  "workout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workout the finish data belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the finish data point */,
  "finish_time" REAL /* Finish time of the athlete during the workout */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the finish */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the finish data point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the finish data point was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("finish_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_finish_data_workout_id FOREIGN KEY ("workout_id") REFERENCES workouts ("workout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wash_data" (
  "wash_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wash data point */,
  "workout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workout the wash data belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the wash data point */,
  "wash_value" REAL /* Wash value of the athlete during the workout */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the wash */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the wash data point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the wash data point was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wash_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wash_data_workout_id FOREIGN KEY ("workout_id") REFERENCES workouts ("workout_id")
)
